statement.en: Qualitative insight into uronylated human milk oligosaccharides and mucin derived non-invasively from the neonatal gut
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is observation-impossible in its current form. The abstract is embargoed/withheld, making it impossible to evaluate the substantive axiom content. The categorization as 'cs.AI' appears incongruent with the biological/biochemical subject matter (uronylated oligosaccharides, neonatal gut mucin), suggesting possible metadata error or cross-disciplinary miscategorization. Without access to thesis body, no truth-value or formalizability assessment is feasible.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 母乳の分子が腸壁を越えて、赤ちゃんの体が読む暗号になる。
